meaning: ship's inertial navigation system 船舶惯性导航系统
examples: He craves redemption for his sins.
You just go to the church and confess your sins.
I was shown that I am a sinner, that I needed to repent of my sins.
She's an albatross, a personal demon that forces him to pay for past sins.
Thanks to the scapegoat, the Children of Israel were cleansed of their collective sins.
